title: What exactly are the animatics episodes
display_title: What exactly are the animatics episodes
wikitext:
[]: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by Riptide » Sun Feb 09, 2025 7:43 pm Sorry if this is a dumb question but I couldn’t find anything explaining them on the wiki. Are they the step before animating the full episode? Thanks

[]: Re: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Feb 11, 2025 2:52 pm Yeah. The episode is still in production at that point, but being edited together like that gives the directors an idea of how it will flow.

[]: Re: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by 2Lacissal2 » Fri Feb 21, 2025 7:48 am The Collector's (I think) and Ultimate editions bluray also have animatic collections for episodes 9, 15, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26

[]: Re: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by DTGee » Fri Feb 21, 2025 5:48 pm They're a mix of layouts and rough animation. I've heard other people say these are what the voice actors would record to, but I have no idea if that's accurate or not.

Article: What exactly are the animatics episodes
[]: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by Riptide » Sun Feb 09, 2025 7:43 pm Sorry if this is a dumb question but I couldn’t find anything explaining them on the wiki. Are they the step before animating the full episode? Thanks

[]: Re: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Tue Feb 11, 2025 2:52 pm Yeah. The episode is still in production at that point, but being edited together like that gives the directors an idea of how it will flow.

[]: Re: What exactly are the animatics episodes?             Quote Post by 2Lacissal2 » Fri Feb 21, 2025 7:48 am The Collector's (I think) and Ultimate editions bluray also have animatic collections for episodes 9, 15, 18, 19, 20, 21, 22, 23, 24, 25, 26
